name: Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
Method #1: Soak the bread in cold water and squeeze out any excess liquid. Add the seasoning and melted fat to the bowl with the bread cubes. Mix well, then add the beaten egg and finely chopped onion.
Method #2: Soak the bread in cold water and squeeze out any excess liquid. Heat the melted fat in a skillet over medium heat. Once hot, add the bread cubes and stir until the fat is absorbed by the bread. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Add the beaten egg and finely chopped onion, then let cool before filling the bird.
I've tried both methods and found them equally delicious! This recipe is from The Settlement Cookbook. You'll need to double the ingredients for a turkey.
